children.heading: Creation of Trust Fund
children.label: a Creation of Trust Fund
children.text: There is established in the Treasury of the United States a trust fund to be known as the “Airport and Airway Trust Fund”, consisting of such amounts as may be appropriated, credited, or paid into the Airport and Airway Trust Fund as provided in this section, section 9503(c)(5), or section 9602(b).

children.heading: Transfers to Airport and Airway Trust Fund
children.label: b Transfers to Airport and Airway Trust Fund
A
children.text: section 4041(c) (relating to aviation fuels),

children.label: B

children.label: C

children.label: D
children.text: section 4081 with respect to aviation gasoline and kerosene to the extent attributable to the rate specified in section 4081(a)(2)(C), and
the amounts determined by the Secretary of the Treasury to be equivalent to the amounts of civil penalties collected under , United States Code.section 47107(m) of title 49

children.heading: Appropriation of additional sums
children.label: c Appropriation of additional sums
children.text: There are hereby authorized to be appropriated to the Airport and Airway Trust Fund such additional sums as may be required to make the expenditures referred to in subsection (d) of this section.

children.heading: Transfers from Airport and Airway Trust Fund on account of certain refunds
children.label: 2 Transfers from Airport and Airway Trust Fund on account of certain refunds
children.text: The Secretary of the Treasury shall pay from time to time from the Airport and Airway Trust Fund into the general fund of the Treasury amounts equivalent to the amounts paid after , in respect of fuel used in aircraft, under section 6420 (relating to amounts paid in respect of gasoline used on farms), 6421 (relating to amounts paid in respect of gasoline used for certain nonhighway purposes), or 6427 (relating to fuels not used for taxable purposes) (other than subsection ()(4) thereof).August 31, 1982l

children.heading: Transfers from the Airport and Airway Trust Fund on account of certain section 34 credits
children.label: 3 Transfers from the Airport and Airway Trust Fund on account of certain section 34 credits
children.text: The Secretary of the Treasury shall pay from time to time from the Airport and Airway Trust Fund into the general fund of the Treasury amounts equivalent to the credits allowed under section 34 (other than payments made by reason of paragraph (4) of section 6427()) with respect to fuel used after . Such amounts shall be transferred on the basis of estimates by the Secretary of the Treasury, and proper adjustments shall be made in amounts subsequently transferred to the extent prior estimates were in excess of or less than the credits allowed.lAugust 31, 1982

children.heading: Transfers for refunds and credits not to exceed Trust Fund revenues attributable to fuel used
children.label: 4 Transfers for refunds and credits not to exceed Trust Fund revenues attributable to fuel used
children.text: The amounts payable from the Airport and Airway Trust Fund under paragraph (2) or (3) shall not exceed the amounts required to be appropriated to such Trust Fund with respect to fuel so used.

children.heading: Transfers from Airport and Airway Trust Fund on account of refunds of taxes on transportation by air
children.label: 5 Transfers from Airport and Airway Trust Fund on account of refunds of taxes on transportation by air
children.text: The Secretary of the Treasury shall pay from time to time from the Airport and Airway Trust Fund into the general fund of the Treasury amounts equivalent to the amounts paid after , under section 6402 (relating to authority to make credits or refunds) or section 6415 (relating to credits or refunds to persons who collected certain taxes) in respect of taxes under sections 4261 and 4271.December 31, 1995

children.heading: Transfers from the Airport and Airway Trust Fund on account of certain airports
children.label: 6 Transfers from the Airport and Airway Trust Fund on account of certain airports
children.text: The Secretary of the Treasury may transfer from the Airport and Airway Trust Fund to the Secretary of Transportation or the Administrator of the Federal Aviation Administration an amount to make a payment to an airport affected by a diversion that is the subject of an administrative action under paragraph (3) or a civil action under paragraph (4) of , United States Code.section 47107(m) of title 49

children.heading: Limitation on transfers to Trust Fund
children.label: e Limitation on transfers to Trust Fund
A
children.text: any provision of law which is not contained or referenced in this title or in a revenue Act; and

children.label: B
children.text: whether such provision of law is a subsequently enacted provision or directly or indirectly seeks to waive the application of this subsection.

children.heading: Exception for prior obligations
children.label: 2 Exception for prior obligations
children.text: Paragraph (1) shall not apply to any expenditure to liquidate any contract entered into (or for any amount otherwise obligated) before , in accordance with the provisions of this section.October 1, 2028

children.heading: Additional transfer to Trust Fund
children.label: f Additional transfer to Trust Fund
children.text: Out of money in the Treasury not otherwise appropriated, there is hereby appropriated $14,000,000,000 to the Airport and Airway Trust Fund.
